scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd themes/adwaita build && bun run --cwd themes/whitesur build && bun run --cwd themes/mactahoe build && bun run --cwd themes/fluent build && bun run --cwd packages/gtk4 build:css && bun run --cwd icons/gtk4 build && bun run --cwd packages/adwaita build:css && bun run --cwd icons/adwaita build && bun run --cwd icons/whitesur build && bun run --cwd icons/mactahoe build && bun run --cwd icons/fluent build
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run --cwd packages/website build
scripts.check: biome check . && tsc --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/website tsc --noEmit
